creator: zlei@FreeBSD.org
text:
I tested LACP mode while I was fixing bpf tapping [1] with a H3C switch and a dual port Chelsio T520-CR card. IIRC the LCAP mode works great.

From the discuss above, I suspect the switch in front is not configured correctly.

1. https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=5f3d0399e903573e9648385ea6585e54af4d573f
